image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: mRNA vaccines don’t rewrite your DNA — they deliver temporary instructions.
Context visual: Inside your body, tiny lipid nanoparticles act like delivery trucks, bringing mRNA straight to your cells.
Escalation visual: These mRNA strands provide instructions to make a harmless piece of the virus — just enough to train your immune system.
Evidence visual: Research shows these instructions never integrate into your DNA, ensuring your genetic code remains untouched.
Payoff visual: Instead, they teach your immune system to recognize the virus, preparing it for a real encounter.
Cta visual: Curious about how else vaccines work? Hit that follow button for more science insights!
